'''鈭歽-s-zh''' ('''yasazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quitclaim|quitclaim]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quitclaim|quitclaim]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-s-zh
|-
! Lemma
| yasazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yasazhithi|yasazhithi]] || [[word:yasazhiji|yasazhiji]] || [[word:yasazhishi|yasazhishi]] || [[word:yasazhi|yasazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasazhuthuth|yasazhuthuth]] || [[word:yasazhujuj|yasazhujuj]] || [[word:yasazhushush|yasazhushush]] || [[word:yasazh|yasazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasazhuthu|yasazhuthu]] || [[word:yasazhuju|yasazhuju]] || [[word:yasazhushu|yasazhushu]] || [[word:yasazhu|yasazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasazhufuth|yasazhufuth]] || [[word:yasazhufuj|yasazhufuj]] || [[word:yasazhufush|yasazhufush]] || [[word:yasazhuf|yasazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yasazhethe|yasazhethe]] || [[word:yasazheje|yasazheje]] || [[word:yasazheshe|yasazheshe]] || [[word:yasazhe|yasazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasazhothoth|yasazhothoth]] || [[word:yasazhojoj|yasazhojoj]] || [[word:yasazhoshosh|yasazhoshosh]] || [[word:yasazh|yasazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasazhotho|yasazhotho]] || [[word:yasazhojo|yasazhojo]] || [[word:yasazhosho|yasazhosho]] || [[word:yasazho|yasazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasazhofoth|yasazhofoth]] || [[word:yasazhofoj|yasazhofoj]] || [[word:yasazhofosh|yasazhofosh]] || [[word:yasazhof|yasazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yasazh忙th忙|yasazh忙th忙]] || [[word:yasazh忙j忙|yasazh忙j忙]] || [[word:yasazh忙sh忙|yasazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:yasazh忙|yasazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasazhathath|yasazhathath]] || [[word:yasazhajaj|yasazhajaj]] || [[word:yasazhashash|yasazhashash]] || [[word:yasazh|yasazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasazhatha|yasazhatha]] || [[word:yasazhaja|yasazhaja]] || [[word:yasazhasha|yasazhasha]] || [[word:yasazha|yasazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasazhafath|yasazhafath]] || [[word:yasazhafaj|yasazhafaj]] || [[word:yasazhafash|yasazhafash]] || [[word:yasazhaf|yasazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yasazhasha|yasazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyasazhasha|goyasazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyasazhasha|gokiyasazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yasazhn眉sha|yasazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyasazhnkn眉sha|goyasazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyasazhn眉sha|gokiyasazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yasazhsh毛sha|yasazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyasazhnksh毛sha|goyasazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyasazhsh毛sha|gokiyasazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yasazhrosha|yasazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyasazhnkrosha|goyasazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyasazhrosha|gokiyasazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yasazhmusha|yasazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasazhnkmusha|goyasazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasazhmusha|gokiyasazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yasazhsherasha|yasazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyasazhnksherasha|goyasazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyasazhsherasha|gokiyasazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yasazhngasha|yasazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyasazhnkngasha|goyasazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyasazhngasha|gokiyasazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yasazhyasha|yasazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyasazhnkyasha|goyasazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyasazhyasha|gokiyasazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yasazhyamasha|yasazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyasazhnkyamasha|goyasazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyasazhyamasha|gokiyasazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yasazhn眉sh毛sha|yasazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyasazhnkn眉sh毛sha|goyasazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyasazhn眉sh毛sha|gokiyasazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yasazhn眉rosha|yasazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyasazhnkn眉rosha|goyasazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyasazhn眉rosha|gokiyasazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasazhn眉musha|yasazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasazhnkn眉musha|goyasazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasazhn眉musha|gokiyasazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yasazhsh毛n眉sha|yasazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyasazhnksh毛n眉sha|goyasazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyasazhsh毛n眉sha|gokiyasazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yasazhsh毛rosha|yasazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyasazhnksh毛rosha|goyasazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyasazhsh毛rosha|gokiyasazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasazhsh毛musha|yasazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasazhnksh毛musha|goyasazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasazhsh毛musha|gokiyasazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yasazhron眉sha|yasazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyasazhnkron眉sha|goyasazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyasazhron眉sha|gokiyasazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yasazhrosh毛sha|yasazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyasazhnkrosh毛sha|goyasazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyasazhrosh毛sha|gokiyasazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasazhromusha|yasazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasazhnkromusha|goyasazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasazhromusha|gokiyasazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yasazhmun眉sha|yasazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyasazhnkmun眉sha|goyasazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyasazhmun眉sha|gokiyasazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yasazhmush毛sha|yasazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyasazhnkmush毛sha|goyasazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyasazhmush毛sha|gokiyasazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yasazhmurosha|yasazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyasazhnkmurosha|goyasazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyasazhmurosha|gokiyasazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yasazh|yasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:y忙s忙zh|y忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyasazh|hoyasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoy忙s忙zh|hoy忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyasazh|hohoyasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoy忙s忙zh|hohoy忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉yasazh|n眉yasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉y忙s忙zh|n眉y忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉yasazh|n眉n眉yasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉y忙s忙zh|n眉n眉y忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂yasazh|n茂yasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂y忙s忙zh|n茂y忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂yasazh|n茂n茂yasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂y忙s忙zh|n茂n茂y忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyasazh|luyasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luy忙s忙zh|luy忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyasazh|luluyasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluy忙s忙zh|luluy忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyasazh|liyasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liy忙s忙zh|liy忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyasazh|liliyasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliy忙s忙zh|liliy忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyasazh|koyasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koy忙s忙zh|koy忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyasazh|kokoyasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoy忙s忙zh|kokoy忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyasazh|keyasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:key忙s忙zh|key忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyasazh|kekeyasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekey忙s忙zh|kekey忙s忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
